content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 17, 2017

Colleen Winchester
Sr. Deputy City Attorney
Office of the City Attorney
City of San Jose
200 East Santa Clara Street, 16th Floor
San Jose, CA 95113-1905

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-17-088

Dear Ms. Winchester:

This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest provisions of
the Political Reform Act and Section 1090. Pursuant to your e-mail dated April 17, 2017, we
consider your advice request to be withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Hyla P. Wagner
General Counsel

By: Zachary W. Norton
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

ZWN:jgl

sections.question_synthetic: The requester sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act and Section 1090, but subsequently withdrew the request.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC treats the advice request as withdrawn and invites the requester to contact the Commission if further questions arise.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Specific details of the original legal question not provided in the document text. Addressed to Colleen Winchester, Sr. Deputy City Attorney.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requester sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act and Section 1090, but subsequently withdrew the request.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC treats the advice request as withdrawn and invites the requester to contact the Commission if further questions arise.
